title: Free sessions for cricket groundsmen
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - South Western Districts...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - South Western Districts Cricket will host practical sessions to assist groundsmen officiating at clubs, schools and municipalities.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - South Western Districts Cricket will host practical sessions to assist groundsmen officiating at clubs, schools and municipalities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The sessions will be free of charge and will take place at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn on Tuesday 12 August, starting at 09:00 and running until 16:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will also be a focus on basic maintenance programmes. Interested members can contract Pieter Stuurman by 1 August at the SWDC office on 044 272 6604 or [email protected]","html":"There will also be a focus on basic maintenance programmes. Interested members can contract Pieter Stuurman by 1 August at the SWDC office on 044 272 6604 or [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
